summary: Tested BLOCK 346 (The Mini-Groove Sidebar). All features working correctly. Backend GET /api/prompts/archive returns enriched data with 'featured' object containing cover_url, record_title, record_artist, caption, username, avatar_url. Frontend drawer title is 'The Mini-Groove', mini-cards are non-clickable (cursor:default), have 'DAILY PROMPT' gold small-caps label, 40px album artwork, user avatar/@username, and 24px gap spacing.
critical_code_review_comments: PromptArchiveDrawer.js line 25: cursor:default correctly applied to MiniCard div making cards non-clickable
PromptArchiveDrawer.js line 32: 'DAILY PROMPT' label uses fontVariant:small-caps and color:#C8861A (gold)
PromptArchiveDrawer.js line 73: Album artwork container is w-10 h-10 (40px)
PromptArchiveDrawer.js lines 57-67: User avatar (w-4 h-4) and @username displayed above album art
PromptArchiveDrawer.js line 150: gap-6 class applied to list container (24px vertical spacing)
PromptArchiveDrawer.js: No onClick handlers or Link wrappers on MiniCard - purely display
daily_prompts.py lines 304-321: Featured object correctly populated from prompt_responses and users collections
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 346 tested: Archive drawer renamed to 'The Mini-Groove' with new MiniCard component. Each card has gold 'DAILY PROMPT' label with small-caps, prompt text, date, response count. Cards with responses (featured truthy) show: user avatar + @username above a 40px rounded album cover, record title/artist, optional caption. Cards use cursor:default (non-clickable). Container uses gap-6 (24px). Archive opens via 'See what the Hive said yesterday' link on Daily Prompt card.

BLOCK_346_backend_featured_object.details: GET /api/prompts/archive returns 'featured' object with cover_url, record_title, record_artist, caption, username, avatar_url for prompts with responses. Returns null for prompts without responses.

BLOCK_346_drawer_title.details: Drawer title changed to 'The Mini-Groove' with data-testid='prompt-archive-title'

BLOCK_346_non_clickable_cards.details: MiniCard component has cursor:default inline style. No onClick handlers or Link wrappers. Purely display component.

BLOCK_346_daily_prompt_label.details: 'DAILY PROMPT' label on each card with color:#C8861A (gold), fontVariant:small-caps, text-[9px], tracking-[0.2em], uppercase

BLOCK_346_40px_artwork.details: Album artwork container is w-10 h-10 (40px) with rounded-md corners. Measured 40x40px in browser.

BLOCK_346_user_avatar_handle.details: Cards with responses show Avatar (w-4 h-4) and @username span above album artwork. data-testid='mini-card-avatar' and data-testid='mini-card-username'

BLOCK_346_24px_spacing.details: Archive list container uses gap-6 class which equals 24px. Verified via getComputedStyle().gap = '24px'

BLOCK_346_archive_link.details: 'See what the Hive said yesterday' link on Daily Prompt card opens archive drawer correctly

mocked_api_note: Streaming links (Spotify/Apple Music) are MOCKED with search URL placeholders. Resend email is MOCKED for most platform emails.
